title: Smoky Indian Chicken Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired dish that combines the richness of smoky spices with the tender taste of chicken.
instructions: 1. Rinse the rice in a fine mesh strainer and soak it in 3 cups of water for 30 minutes.
2. Drain the water and set the rice aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the chicken, garam masala, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to coat the chicken evenly.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 6-8 minutes.
6. In a large saucepan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
7. Add the soaked rice to the saucepan and stir to coat the rice with oil.
8. Add 3 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
9. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and fluffy.
10. Add the cooked chicken to the saucepan with the rice and mix well.
11. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes or until the chicken is heated through.
12. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
